fields.title: Port pi-autoresearch into tau with Effect-native service architecture
fields.description: Port the pi-autoresearch external contract into tau while replacing the imperative extension with tau’s Effect-native layering. Preserve init_experiment, run_experiment, log_experiment, /autoresearch, and the worktree sidecar files autoresearch.md, autoresearch.sh, autoresearch.checks.sh, autoresearch.ideas.md, and autoresearch.jsonl. Make autoresearch.jsonl the canonical persisted history and route all command and git effects through tau’s sandbox-aware execution model.
fields.design: Autoresearch is a sibling domain to Ralph, not a shared framework. Follow the Ralph-shaped split: src/autoresearch/schema.ts, errors.ts, paths.ts, repo.ts, view.ts, services/autoresearch.ts, and a thin src/autoresearch/index.ts wired from src/app.ts. The core service owns per-session runtime state keyed by session id; the adapter owns only pi registration, rendering glue, and per-call execution boundaries. All benchmark, checks, commit, and revert actions flow through an injected AutoresearchExecutionBoundary created at the tau adapter edge from sandbox-owned behavior. V1 explicitly excludes session-history reconstruction fallback and exact fullscreen dashboard hotkey parity.
